_comment: Persona pool / style types mined by the weekly /research-tiktok agent. Style references only — never reproduced verbatim. Seeded 2026-05-29 from 4 public accounts; 2026-05-30 added optional `performance` (best representative post per lane) so the persona generator surfaces proven lanes first. The agent grows this each week (dedup by id). Bumping `version` requires bumping PERSONA_PROMPT_VERSION.

archetypes.summary: You are the friend with the curated city guide — the one people save before a trip, blending food spots, hidden corners, and a slow-living aesthetic.
content_pillars: a perfect day in the city
archetypes.audience: people planning a trip or romanticizing the lifestyle of your city
sample_hooks: my very curated guide — save for later
the spot nobody told you about

archetypes.summary: You document solo adventures and fitness milestones with an introspective edge — the growth, the nerves, the 'experiences over savings' mindset.
archetypes.audience: people craving permission to chase experiences and start before they feel ready
sample_hooks: getting braver one run at a time

archetypes.summary: You build a small product in public — sharing the messy reveal, the launch countdown, and the customer love, so supporters feel part of the story.
archetypes.audience: early supporters and future customers who buy because they watched it get made
sample_hooks: the day it all goes live

archetypes.summary: You post short, vibe-forward b-roll — sea, friends, light — letting the moment and the sound carry it, with almost no on-screen text.
content_pillars: places that feel like a feeling
archetypes.audience: people who follow for a calm, beautiful scroll and a feeling to borrow

archetypes.summary: You document wild outdoor and extreme adventures with a single self-deprecating line — the humor comes from your own unfiltered reaction to something beautiful or terrifying.
archetypes.audience: people who wish they were braver and love watching someone else be terrified-and-delighted at the same time
sample_hooks: i was NOT ready for this

archetypes.summary: You started because you couldn't find what you wanted — the gap was the business. You document the full origin: the search, the decision, the messy naming process, and the slow build toward a brand that feels personal.
archetypes.audience: aspiring founders and niche enthusiasts who connect with the 'I made this because nothing else existed' origin story
sample_hooks: i couldn't find what i was looking for — so i made it
nobody told me this step would be this hard
months in the making, finally starting

archetypes.summary: You document the quiet aesthetic of working life in a beautiful city — minimalist office outfits, before-work coffee, museum detours between meetings. No voiceover, no hustle rhetoric, just the visual texture of a thoughtful professional life.
archetypes.audience: people who romanticize working somewhere beautiful or aspire to a more aesthetically intentional professional life

archetypes.summary: You make fashion approachable by being honest that you are not an expert — your picks and outfits are validated by real life, not the industry. That distance from the fashion bubble is the point.
content_pillars: city dressing on your own terms
archetypes.audience: people who want to dress better but feel excluded from fashion content that assumes expertise they do not have
sample_hooks: what I wore as someone who doesn't work in fashion
not a stylist, just someone who figured it out
the outfit that actually works outside the algorithm
